Metadata.title: Almir Santos Games
Metadata.description: Almir Santos gaming channel — Lives, videos, and much more!

LivePix.title: SUPPORT THE CHANNEL
LivePix.subtitle: Choose a way to help the channel keep growing!
LivePix.memberDesc: Become a channel member on YouTube and get access to exclusive emotes and special perks!
LivePix.memberImageAlt: QR Code — Become a Channel Member
LivePix.livepixDesc: Send your message and support directly during live streams! Your contribution appears in real time on screen.
LivePix.pixDesc: Make a direct donation via Pix to support the channel quickly and easily!

Magazine.title: SUPERUP JOGOS MAGAZINE
Magazine.subtitle: Discover the SuperUp Jogos magazine — exclusive retro gaming content!
Magazine.description: SuperUp Jogos is a digital magazine dedicated to the world of retro and classic games. Click on the magazine to access the QR Code and learn more!
Magazine.clickToOpen: 👆 Click the magazine to see the QR Code
